calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant SFHD Partners LLC An Arizona Limited Liability Company DBA Alcatraz Harley-Davidson and Defendant SJHD Partners LLC A California Limited Liability Company.

Dept.505: Judge: Dennis Hayashi; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Jones and Deputy Belen; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:18:35 a.m and concluding at 10:31:53 a.m. (D505)

Eric Lorenzini, Esq. representing and appearing for Plaintiff Dons Hotel Owner LLP a Delaware Limited Partnership via Zoom Video Conference.
Sarah Gulla, sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Complaint filed Dec-04-2024.
Proof of personal service as to Defendants filed Dec-19-2024.
Default entered as to Defendant on Jan-16-2025.
Notice of Motion for request for default judgment filed Mar-28-2025.

Counsel provides a summary of the facts to the court.
Witness is examined and testifies.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:
Damages $358,307.53
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $4,667.94
Attorney's Fees $5,067.50
Costs $1,327.39
Total Judgment $396,370.36

Proposed judgment signed and filed this day.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Continued To Jul-09-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
